title: 48 Drug Batches Fail Quality Tests in CDSCO's March 2026 NSQ Alert
summary: New Delhi: In a fresh drug safety alert underscoring continued regulatory vigilance, 48 batches of drugs, medical devices, and allied products have been declared Not of Standard Quality (NSQ) by...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
